task_completion.description: Modify the child theme's functions.php to register the custom post type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or code editor showing the file '/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-content/themes/agency-child/functions.php' being edited to include a 'register_post_type' function call for 'portfolio' with the specified labels and supports.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Custom Post Type appears in the WordPress admin menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress admin dashboard sidebar displays a new menu item labeled 'Portfolio Projects'.

task_completion.description: Create a new Portfolio Project and enter the specified title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress post editor is open for a new Portfolio Project with the title field containing exactly 'NASA Graphics Standards Manual Restoration'.

task_completion.description: Add the project description content to the post body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WordPress post editor body contains text content, indicating the agent pasted the contents from the 'project_description.txt' file.

task_completion.description: Set the post excerpt to the specified text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Excerpt' field in the WordPress editor sidebar is filled with 'A comprehensive restoration of the 1975 NASA Graphics Standards Manual.'

task_completion.description: Upload and set the featured image for the post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Featured Image' section in the WordPress editor sidebar displays an uploaded image, indicating 'featured_image.png' was successfully set.
A 'Post published' confirmation notice is visible, or the post status is clearly shown as 'Published' in the editor or the Portfolio Projects list.

integrity.description: Ensure no Custom Post Type plugins were used for the registration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent modifies the PHP code directly and does not navigate to the Plugins page to install or use tools like 'Custom Post Type UI' (CPT UI).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually interacted with WordPress to publish the post.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show genuine navigation through the WordPress admin GUI (or valid WP-CLI commands in the terminal) to create and publish the post, rather than just typing expected outputs into a text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the functions.php file was genuinely edited.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a real text editor (e.g., nano, vim) or valid shell commands (e.g., cat, echo, sed) being used to modify the functions.php file in the correct directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom post type key must be exactly 'portfolio'. The theme path modified must be '/var/www/html/wordpress/wp-content/themes/agency-child'. The post title must be exactly 'NASA Graphics Standards Manual Restoration'. The excerpt must be exactly 'A comprehensive restoration of the 1975 NASA Graphics Standards Manual.'. No Custom Post Type plugins are allowed; the registration must be done entirely via code.
